name: view scope games played cross season week cut
expected_query: with "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.nfl_team) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_18') and "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('POST', 'REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CASE WHEN player.date_of_birth IS NULL OR player.date_of_birth = '0000-00-00' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, TO_DATE(player.date_of_birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) + (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, TO_DATE(player.date_of_birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 12.0) + (EXTRACT(DAY FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, TO_DATE(player.date_of_birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 365.25), 2) END as age_0, "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939"."rate_type_total_count" AS "games_played_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939" on "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('RB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, player.date_of_birth, "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939"."rate_type_total_count", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
